raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo mannas Azzis irr us
wiſſeem winnu Zekfeem/ manna
Preeſchâ tee ne irr apſlehpti/
nedś winnu Noseegums apſlahte
preekſch mannahm Azzim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet pirmak atmaſkaſchu
es winnu Noseegimus/ un win-
nu Grehkus diwkahtigi/ tapehz
ka tee mannu Semmi irr ſagab-
niſſchi/ tee irr mannu eemanto-
jainu Teefu ar tabm uomiṟru-
ſchahm Meetahm winnu Eſka-
deewibas/ un winnu Neganti-
bas ſagabniſſchi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ak KUNGS! tu eſt
manns Spehks/ un mans Stip-
rums/ un mans Patwerums
Behou Deena. Pee tewim nahte
tee Pagani no Semmes Gal-
leem un taẓzihs: Teefham/ muh-
fu Tehwi irr nepateerus/ un ne-
leetus Deevektus peeturreijſchi/
pee ka tomehr neneeka bija/ kas
patihdſeht warreja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Buhs tad weenam Zil-
wekam ſew Deewus darriht/
kas Deewi ne irraid?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tadeht reds/ es darri-
ſchu teem ſchim brihſchaim fin-
namn/ es darriſchu teem finna-
mu fawu Rohku un fawu War-
ru/ un teems buhs atſiht/ ka
manns Wahrs irr KUNGS.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ee Grehki Juhda irr ra-
stiti ar Dſelses Naksta-
uma/ ar Demantes Afim-
ni/ tee irr uhs winnu Sird-
Galdn/ un us jubfu Alta-
Raggeem eerakstiti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta ka winnu Behrni pee-
minn ſawus Altarus/ un tawu
Ekadeewigus Meschus/ pee ſa-
teem Kohkeem/ us augſteem Pa-
kalneem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet es nodohſchu manni
Kalnu ar to Tihrumu/ taw-
Padohmu/ un wiſſas tawa
Mantas par Laupijumu/ lihi-
ar taweein Augſtuumeem/
Grehku deht/ wiſſas tawa
Robbeschâs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta tapſi tu zaar taw-
pachhu Wainu no tawa Jhp-
ſchuma iſdsihts/ ko es tew dew-
biju. Un es likſchu tew tawee-
Eenaidneekem kalpoht kah-
Semmê/ ko tu ne paſihſti/
juhs eſat weenu uggunt ced-
dsinajſchi eekſch mannas Bah-
nbas/ tas degs muhſchigi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta fafka tas KUNGS-
Nolahdehts irr tas Zilweks/ fe-
abs Zilwekeem patanjabs/
Meeſu eezeit par fawu Elkou-
an ka Sirds no ta KUNG-
atkahpj.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo tas buhs itt ka Si-
Turſneſi/ un ne redſehs/ kad t-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
